title: Kate and Laurel Tolland Wood Framed Panel Wall Mirror, 12x48, Brown
features: The trellis like fretwork and elongated shape offers a romantically shabby-chic style for your traditional, transitional or casual home decor
Create a display of reflected light or an impressive decorative look above a mantle or bed. It's the perfect wall accent for so many places in your home
Measures 47. 25-inches tall x 11. 75-inches wide. It has a D-ring hardware system attached to the back for easy wall display either horizontally or vertically.
You'll make a statement without going over the top when you use 2 or more of these panel mirrors to create a gorgeous focal point and really open up a room
The frame is made of a heavy man-made wood that is built to last while the rustic finish gives it a beautiful antique appeal
description: Product Description This bold, romantic mirror presents your home with a practical accent right out of a fairy tale with its delicate fretwork and vintage beauty. It's not just for decoration, either, for there is plenty of functionality within the Tolland Wall Mirror. You will appreciate how easily the extra-long shape brightens and opens up any room, bringing in more dimension and light. The mirror measures 48 inches tall by 12 inches wide. It has multiple D-ring metal hangers attached to the back for easy wall display either horizontally or vertically. You'll make rustic a statement without going over the top when you use two or more of these panel mirrors to create a gorgeous focal point and open up a room. Safety Warning Warning: This product contains glass which may break if not handled with care. Keep out of reach of children. Always use appropriate safety measures when installing and handling the mirror to avoid injury from sharp edges or broken glass.
